mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation(elderly_id, reservation_user, phone, reservation_time, type, status, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{elderlyId}, #{reservationUser}, #{phone}, #{reservationTime}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE reservation
elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, reservation_user = #{reservationUser}, phone = #{phone}, reservation_time = #{reservationTime}, type = #{type}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reservation SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT r.*, e.name as elderlyName FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN elderly e ON r.elderly_id = e.id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
